steps.title: Spot the defining contrast
steps.content: The word however marks the core structure: the researchers' claim that the ferns are ancient (predating Gondwana ~80 million years ago) contrasts sharply with the study findings (crown age 8.5–10 million years). This incompatibility is the passage's defining feature.

steps.title: Match the structure to the choices
steps.content: Choice D correctly matches the text's structure: it describes an idea put forward (the researchers' posit about ancient ferns), then presents study results that are incompatible with that idea (Sundue et al.'s findings of much younger crown ages). Choices A, B, and C each project additional meaning the text doesn't support—that the study clarified reasoning, prompted reconsideration, or explained the discrepancy. That matches choice D — D is correct.
